name: Effect Toggle
description: Loop a safe single-player effect and clean it up when the script stops.
script:
# Shulkr Effect Toggle - safe single-player effect loop.
from system.lib import minescript as ms

import atexit
import time

EFFECT = "speed"
SECONDS = 3
AMPLIFIER = 1


def command(text):
    ms.execute(text)
    ms.flush()


def cleanup():
    command(f"effect clear @s minecraft:{EFFECT}")


atexit.register(cleanup)
ms.echo(f"[Shulkr] {EFFECT} enabled. Stop this script to disable.")

while True:
    command(f"effect give @s minecraft:{EFFECT} {SECONDS} {AMPLIFIER} true")
    time.sleep(1.0)
